title: Shipping & Returns Policy
body:
**Shipping Policy**

We ship across India via trusted courier partners. Orders are processed within 2-3 business days.

- Standard delivery: 5–7 business days
- Express delivery: 2–3 business days (charges apply)
- Free shipping on orders above ₹2,999

**Returns & Exchange Policy**

We accept exchanges within 7 days of delivery for manufacturing defects only. Since our jewellery is handcrafted, slight variations are a mark of authenticity and are not eligible for return.

To initiate an exchange, WhatsApp us at +91 98699 39003 with your order details and photos of the issue.

**Care Instructions**

All our jewellery is delicate and should be stored in the pouches provided. Avoid contact with water, perfume, and chemicals to maintain the finish.
meta_title: Shipping & Returns Policy | Ria Art Jewellery
meta_description: Read the shipping and returns policy for Ria Art Jewellery. Pan India shipping, easy exchanges, and handcrafted quality.
